nasb.text: Now behold, you have risen up in your fathers’ place, a brood of sinful men, to add still more to the burning anger of the Lord against Israel.

esv.text: And behold, you have risen in your fathers’ place, a brood of sinful men, to increase still more the fierce anger of the Lord against Israel!

cnv.text: 現在，你們這些罪人的族類，也來接替你們的先祖，增添耶和華對以色列的烈怒！

ccb.text: “现在，你们这群罪人的后代竟然重蹈前人的覆辙，加剧耶和华的怒气。
